---
title: "nitrix.semiring"
generated: true
signature-hash: ff43e1690954413d
description: "KeOps-style streaming reductions over arbitrary algebras."
listing:
  id: nitrix-semiring-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-semiring/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.semiring`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
KeOps-style streaming reductions over arbitrary algebras.

This subpackage provides matrix and graph reductions that run over a
user-selected algebraic structure rather than the fixed
(add, multiply) ring of ordinary linear algebra. The same streaming
kernels back the max-plus, min-plus, log-sum-exp, boolean and Euclidean
reductions used throughout the wider library, so that morphology,
smoothing and mesh aggregation can all be expressed as reductions over a
chosen semiring.

The public surface is organised as follows.

- [`Semiring`](nitrix-semiring/Semiring.qmd) (relaxed) and [`StrictSemiring`](nitrix-semiring/StrictSemiring.qmd)
  (which asserts associativity) describe the algebraic structure supplied
  to a reduction, built on the [`Semigroup`](nitrix-semiring/Semigroup.qmd) and [`Monoid`](nitrix-semiring/Monoid.qmd)
  protocols.
- The built-in algebras [`REAL`](nitrix-semiring-algebras/REAL.qmd), [`LOG`](nitrix-semiring-algebras/LOG.qmd),
  [`TROPICAL_MAX_PLUS`](nitrix-semiring-algebras/TROPICAL_MAX_PLUS.qmd), [`TROPICAL_MIN_PLUS`](nitrix-semiring-algebras/TROPICAL_MIN_PLUS.qmd), [`BOOLEAN`](nitrix-semiring-algebras/BOOLEAN.qmd)
  and [`EUCLIDEAN`](nitrix-semiring-algebras/EUCLIDEAN.qmd) cover the common cases.
- [`semiring_matmul`](nitrix-semiring-matmul/semiring_matmul.qmd) and [`semiring_ell_matmul`](nitrix-semiring-ell/semiring_ell_matmul.qmd) perform dense
  and ELL-sparse matrix products over a chosen semiring.
- [`semiring_ell_edge_aggregate`](nitrix-semiring-ell_edge/semiring_ell_edge_aggregate.qmd) performs edge-functional
  aggregation over an ELL adjacency structure, with optional per-edge
  `edge_attr`, and [`ell_row_softmax`](nitrix-semiring-ell_edge/ell_row_softmax.qmd) provides the row-normalising
  attention pre-pass used by graph-attention aggregation.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*shape` | a variadic group of axes (`shape`) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-semiring-symbols}
:::
